verses.text: In the third month they come to Sinai and camp before the mount. At Sinai. The redeemed gather to meet God.
In the third month they come to Sinai and camp before the mount. At Sinai. The redeemed gather to meet God.
God offers covenant: if they obey, they shall be 'a peculiar treasure... a kingdom of priests.' The offer. Obedience makes them God's own treasure.
God offers covenant: if they obey, they shall be 'a peculiar treasure... a kingdom of priests.' The offer. Obedience makes them God's own treasure.
God offers covenant: if they obey, they shall be 'a peculiar treasure... a kingdom of priests.' The offer. Obedience makes them God's own treasure.
God offers covenant: if they obey, they shall be 'a peculiar treasure... a kingdom of priests.' The offer. Obedience makes them God's own treasure.
The people answer, 'All that the LORD hath spoken we will do.' Pledged. They vow obedience before they hear the law.
The people answer, 'All that the LORD hath spoken we will do.' Pledged. They vow obedience before they hear the law.
God will come in a cloud; they must sanctify themselves for the third day. Prepare. Meeting God demands holiness.
God will come in a cloud; they must sanctify themselves for the third day. Prepare. Meeting God demands holiness.
God will come in a cloud; they must sanctify themselves for the third day. Prepare. Meeting God demands holiness.
Bounds are set; whoever touches the mount shall die. Barrier. The holy God is not approached carelessly.
Bounds are set; whoever touches the mount shall die. Barrier. The holy God is not approached carelessly.
Moses sanctifies the people, who wash their clothes. Cleansed. They ready themselves to draw near.
Moses sanctifies the people, who wash their clothes. Cleansed. They ready themselves to draw near.
Thunder, lightning, a thick cloud, and trumpet; the mount quakes and Moses speaks. Awe. God descends in terrible majesty.
Thunder, lightning, a thick cloud, and trumpet; the mount quakes and Moses speaks. Awe. God descends in terrible majesty.
Thunder, lightning, a thick cloud, and trumpet; the mount quakes and Moses speaks. Awe. God descends in terrible majesty.
Thunder, lightning, a thick cloud, and trumpet; the mount quakes and Moses speaks. Awe. God descends in terrible majesty.
God calls Moses up and warns the priests not to break through to gaze. Warned. Even the favoured must keep their place.
God calls Moses up and warns the priests not to break through to gaze. Warned. Even the favoured must keep their place.
God calls Moses up and warns the priests not to break through to gaze. Warned. Even the favoured must keep their place.
Moses reminds God of the bounds; he goes down to warn the people. Guarded. The line between God and man is kept.
Moses reminds God of the bounds; he goes down to warn the people. Guarded. The line between God and man is kept.
